arts.ttl: Liverpool Predicted Lineup vs. Wolves: Premier League
arts.sum: Liverpool will be without Curtis Jones, Joe Gomez and possibly Cody Gakpo against Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister 'fight' praised as Liverpool midfielder stands up for Arne Slot
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister was an impressive performer for Liverpool in the Goodison derby against Everton on Wednesday

arts.ttl: Liverpool news: Pep Guardiola goads Arne Slot with title claim as Mo Salah agent drops hint
arts.sum: Liverpool welcome Wolves to Anfield this Sunday in a crucial game for their title challenge, though the Reds will have Arne Slot in the dugout despite his red card against Everton last time out

arts.ttl: Why Merseyside derby mayhem could be a blessing in disguise for Liverpool in their quest for Premier League title, writes DANNY MURPHY
arts.sum: DANNY MURPHY: What happened to Liverpool at the end of Wednesday night's stormy Merseyside derby will be a blessing. Everything has gone right for Arne Slot's team this season.

arts.ttl: 'A good age' - Arne Slot lifts lid on Mohamed Salah and makes 'useless' Liverpool admission
arts.sum: Liverpool boss Arne Slot has explained what it is like working with Mohamed Salah ahead of Premier League showdown with Wolves

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs. Wolverhampton Wanderers: Can Arne Slot improve on Everton draw, maintain Premier League title race advantage?
arts.sum: Liverpool will have to improve their performance levels if they are to achieve victory against Wolverhampton Wanderers in the Premier League on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Liverpool contract latest: Can Arne Slot keep star defender amidst interest from European giant?
arts.sum: Liverpool face a busy summer, but one of their key defenders hints at their future amidst interest from a European giant in his signature.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Wolves: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Liverpool vs Wolves in the Premier League on Sunday, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer update: Price revealed for cup-winning star as Arne Slot prepared to 'reluctantly' sell in summer window
arts.sum: Liverpool 'reluctantly' accept that they cannot keep cup-winning star at the club and are willing to do business in the summer.

arts.ttl: Ageless Salah remains driving force behind Liverpool quest for trophies
arts.sum: At 32 the striker is part of a new generation, powered by science and making a huge impact on the title race It takes a team to win trophies but it is quite useful to have an individual enjoy the season of their life. Mohamed Salah is that for Liverpool. Highlighting his importance to his side’s success is not exactly controversial but any praise is merited after driving his team into pole position as the business end approaches. Salah leads the Premier League scoring and creativity charts with 22 goals and 14 assists to put Liverpool clear at the top. On a difficult night at Goodison Park in midweek, he set up the opener before scoring in a game of few chances, the ninth time this season he has achieved such a feat. Sunday’s opponents Wolves will be well aware of his threat, although attempting to nullify him is more difficult. Continue reading...
